project_hints.forge_warnings_not_errors: forge build may emit erc20-unchecked-transfer and other warnings — these are NOT compilation errors. Only lines starting with 'error[' are blocking. Always run tests even if warnings are present.
project_hints.test_run_required: Always run forge test after making contract changes. 'Syntactically correct' is NOT a substitute for passing tests. Report exact test count and failure list.
project_hints.twap_staleness: After vm.warp() > 2 hours in tests, call controller.updateTWAP(INITIAL_TWAP) before calling executeMint() — P16B-M1 fix blocks stale-TWAP minting.
project_hints.error_selector_params: For custom errors with parameters, tests must use abi.encodeWithSelector(Error.selector, param1, param2) not just Error.selector.
project_hints.commit_format: Commit title: feat(scope): summary [Agent: devin-delegate] / trailer: Co-authored-by: Chimera <chimera_defi@protonmail.com>

_notes.kimi_quota: Kimi quota exhausted 2026-05-28, switched fallback to claude
_notes.delegation_threshold: Use devin for tasks >2 files or >100 lines; inline for <50 lines single-file
_notes.compliance_improvement: 2026-06-01: Added project_hints to prevent false 'compilation error' bailouts and enforce test runs
